decisions.reason: Current manifest keeps the publish-safe lane shape and adds explicit trust-preflight exit semantics: 0 green, 1 expected yellow, and 2 red/fail.

decisions.reason: Current scripts preserve origin/main backfill:history and add strict validate:release, publish-safe check:publish, local-CI MCP capture, OTEL smoke, source-promotion packet, cockpit, and trust preflight commands.
Current smoke keeps origin/main Worker health release/environment checks, restores provenance-gated recovery gap handling, and adds publish-grace plus GitHub fallback freshness checks.
Current tests preserve origin/main Worker health and recovery-gap assertions while adding publish-grace coverage for the stricter smoke contract.
Current cockpit preserves the PR branch trust-surface work, carries expected/yellow lane metadata, keeps expected warning proof yellow, and keeps red/error proof red.
Current tests preserve the PR branch cockpit coverage and add direct coverage for expected yellow MCP lane proof versus red failure proof.
Current preflight preserves command-level yellow evidence and adds top-level exit codes so FirstBite can distinguish green, yellow, and red trust states.
evidence: npm run trust:preflight -> exit 2 while cockpit verdict remains red

decisions.reason: Current tests assert the top-level trust preflight exit mapping so yellow and red are not collapsed for FirstBite.
